# C

Parent: [Polyglot](../README.md)

Open-source package support files for the C module.

## Key Files

- `becky.c`: Source file in this module.
- `eve.c`: Source file in this module.
- `lilith-daemon.c`: Source file in this module.
- `lilith-eve-whip.c`: Source file in this module.
- `lilith-rotated.c`: Source file in this module.
- `lilith-wasm.c`: Source file in this module.
- `lilith.c`: Source file in this module.

## Usage

Use this README as the local map for this directory. Keep implementation details near the owning source files, and update this document when the directory contract changes.

## Verification

Run the closest package or app-level check through the repository-owned `a0` or `monster` target after changing behavior in this directory.
